sections.title: Personal Data Processing - Direct Identifiers
sections.description: Detect whether direct identifiers are processed anywhere in the solution lifecycle.

questions.prompt: Does your product process names of natural persons?
questions.whyItMatters: Names are direct personal identifiers and usually make personal-data handling obligations applicable.

guidance.plainEnglish: Answer yes if legal names, display names, or contact names are stored, transmitted, exported, or logged.

good: Customer onboarding stores account holder first and last name in the policy record.

sections.title: Threat Modelling & TAM Evidence
sections.description: Ensure architecture evidence exists and is aligned with assessment answers.

questions.prompt: Has a threat model been created or linked for the in-scope architecture?
